openingShlokaMeaning: We bow to Lord Ganesha — remover of obstacles — as we begin this sacred journey.

bride.name: Anushka
bride.bio: Architect by profession, dreamer by heart. She finds poetry in monsoon clouds and laughter in old Hindi cinema.

groom.name: Virat
groom.bio: Captain of the pitch, standard of devotion. He finds music in quiet moments and strength in the eyes of his beloved.

story.title: Our Story
story.body: A beautiful decade of holding hands, quiet conversations, and grand milestones. Now, we stand by Udaipur's sacred waters to begin our forever.

moments.title: The First Spark
moments.note: A chance meeting on a studio set in Mumbai. Effortless conversations sparked a lifetime of connection.

moments.title: Under the Spotlight
moments.note: A historic flying kiss from the pitch to the stands, silently declaring a love that won millions of hearts.

moments.title: Fairytale in Tuscany
moments.note: Exchanged sacred vows under the golden Italian sun, surrounded by quiet blooming pastels and family.

moments.title: A New Grace
moments.note: Blessed with our baby girl, Vamika, bringing profound warmth and anchoring our lives as a family.

moments.title: Sacred Steps
moments.note: A decade of shared dreams leads us to the serene waters of Udaipur, stepping into our eternal promise.

events.title: Haldi
events.description: A morning bathed in turmeric, blessings and joy.

schedule.title: Morning Raga & Chai
schedule.note: Traditional sitar music with hot cutting chai.

schedule.title: Haldi Ceremony & Bathing Ritual
schedule.note: Bathing the couple in marigold petals and sacred turmeric.

schedule.title: Traditional Mewari Feast
schedule.note: A rich culinary journey through local Rajasthani delicacies.

events.dressCode: Vibrant Yellows, Mustard, & Marigold traditional attire
events.guestNotes: Be ready to get smeared in turmeric and love! Wear breathable fabrics.
events.hospitalityInfo: Fresh tender coconut water, sweet lassi, and marigold garlands welcome you.
events.transportNotes: Complimentary shuttle departs the main reception lobby at 9:15 AM.
events.emotionalMessage: Haldi is our laughter bathed in sunshine—a sacred ritual of pure joy, warm blessings, and golden memories.
events.musicAmbience: Traditional Rajasthani Folk & Live Dhol Beats

events.title: Mehendi
events.description: Henna, music, and laughter as the love story is drawn into skin.

schedule.title: Intricate Henna Art & Bangle Bazaar
schedule.note: Exquisite custom mehendi designs by royal artists.

schedule.title: Ghoomar Dancers & Live Folk Songs
schedule.note: Captivating Mewari folk performances under the canopy.

schedule.title: High Tea & Gourmet Chaat Counters
schedule.note: Indian street delicacies presented in royal styling.

events.dressCode: Leheriya, Florals, or Mint & Forest Greens
events.guestNotes: Choose custom designs featuring our signature wedding monogram or hashtag.
events.hospitalityInfo: A dedicated hand relaxation lounge with calming lavender wipes will be active.
events.transportNotes: Shuttles run continuously from the Garden Lawns starting at 3:45 PM.
events.emotionalMessage: As the deep amber henna leaves its touch on our skin, our hearts are forever painted with promises.
events.musicAmbience: Sufi Melodies, Acoustic Sitar, & Bohemian Beats

events.title: Sangeet
events.description: An evening of music, dance and unforgettable performances.

schedule.title: Royal Red Carpet & Cocktails
schedule.note: Signature single malts, custom cocktails, and dynamic portraits.

schedule.title: The Grand Musical Storyboard
schedule.note: A custom choreographic performance tracing our journey together.

schedule.title: After-Hours Revelry & Dhol Fusion
schedule.note: Featuring high-octane live percussion and electric beats.

events.dressCode: Glitzy Indo-Western, Velvet Sherwanis, & Shimmering Lehengas
events.guestNotes: The dance floor is highly addictive. Comfy custom wedding sliders will be provided!
events.hospitalityInfo: Global gourmet live counters and an artisanal dessert bar remain open late.
events.transportNotes: Royal boats depart the palace jetty every 10 minutes from 7:00 PM onwards.
events.emotionalMessage: A night of starlight and pure rhythm, where two families dance as one heartbeat under Udaipur's night sky.
events.musicAmbience: Live Bollywood Orchestra, Electronic Dhol, & Retro Beats

events.title: Wedding
events.description: Seven vows around the sacred fire — the heart of our union.

schedule.title: The Royal Baraat Procession
schedule.note: A grand, vintage-themed musical arrival of the groom.

schedule.title: Varmala & Petal Shower
schedule.note: Exchanging our garlands under a breathtaking lakeside firework display.

schedule.title: Vedic Nuptials & Pheras
schedule.note: Solemnizing our commitment with ancient Sanskrit verses.

events.dressCode: Traditional Indian Royal (Deep Crimson, Maroon, Cream, & Antique Gold)
events.guestNotes: The ceremony is outdoors by the lake. A light pashmina or dinner jacket is advised.
events.hospitalityInfo: Assigned luxury seating. Sacred prasad and traditional warm beverages served.
events.transportNotes: VIP golf cart fleet is at your service from the reception driveway.
events.emotionalMessage: Bound by seven sacred steps, in the presence of ancient fire and the ones we love, we begin our forever.
events.musicAmbience: Live Shehnai, Vedic Chants, & Instrumental Santoor

events.title: Reception
events.description: A celebratory evening with the families we hold dear.

schedule.title: Champagne Toast & Harpsichord Welcome
schedule.note: Welcome greeting with flowing champagne towers and live classical harp.

schedule.title: Cake Cutting & The First Waltz
schedule.note: Under the crystal chandeliers in the majestic Grand Ballroom.

schedule.title: Imperial Gala Feast & Jazz Orchestra
schedule.note: A silver-service sit-down dinner featuring curated global cuisine.

events.dressCode: Formal Black Tie, Evening Gowns, or Royal Tuxedos
events.guestNotes: A professional editorial portrait studio will be set up to capture you in your finest.
events.hospitalityInfo: Dedicated eldercare assistants and children's activity lounge available.
events.transportNotes: Airport departures concierge desk will be active in the lobby.
events.emotionalMessage: A night of grand gratitude—raising a glass of champagne to new horizons, old friends, and endless love.
events.musicAmbience: Live Jazz Quartet & Classical Symphonic Orchestra

rsvp.message: Your presence is our greatest blessing.

seo.title: The Wedding Celebration of Virat ❤️ Anushka
seo.description: A Cinematic Wedding Invitation. Join us as we celebrate love, family, and forever.
seo.keywords: wedding, invitation, Virat and Anushka, Hindu wedding, Udaipur wedding, royal, cinematic
